name: particle-image-reveal
title: Particle Image Reveal
description: A seeded deterministic particle field converges and settles while a slotted image reveals beneath it, the trail thinning until the image holds clean.
evidence: Wave K3 demand slate: seeded-table canvas particles, pure function of (index, time), redraw on every eventful seek

variables.label: Density
variables.description: Particle count for the converging field.

variables.label: Direction
variables.description: ltr sweeps the reveal left to right; center opens an iris from the middle outward.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Particle and monogram color: green rides --brand, blue rides --accent, violet rides --accent-2.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: Optional departure. Default none: the revealed image holds until the frame cuts.
